reviews.review_title: Great concept but a little unpolished
reviews.review_description:
The mini game where you are surviving for many waves is fun, and the different variety of objectives for each wave is nice but maybe a few more things to shoot would could help. The different type of enemies add variety but some are only masked versions of earlier enemies, I'd like to see some big buff enemies with weak spots as I think that'd add another playstyle.

Also I've read and seen images of this other mode where you fight against different enemies and slice them as they fly at you, and fight with Shai-Hulud. How do I access this on the Quest 2?.

developer_response.body: Thanks for review! Once you grab Katana and Bow, in garden magic stone will activate, touch it and portal will open to desert area ! GL !

reviews.review_title: Lots of potential, not quite there
reviews.review_description: The walking speed is so slow but the sprint button is so terribly placed that moving is a chore and you need to move a lot!  Got to wave 30 in the dojo with the bow and sword but the game froze so lost all that progress.  Hopefully the Dev is still actively working on bringing this title to its full potential because it could be really cool!
It's fun if you wanna slice bamboo cut fruit and do absolutely nothing else except waste 10 dollars

First the game hasn’t updated in a year or so second there’s still an unfinished level it says coming in next update but the update still hasn’t come really just a waste of my time and money to buy this Third I am extremely disappointed with the development of this game but I still see some potential for this game to be something really fun
This game was trash I wanted to explore and u can’t do that it’s very confusing

A good game,  graphically it looks great
What I would actually find a nice addition in the kendo dojo is a sparring partner for duel battles in which you learn to attack and defend. (maybe in kendo style)
I'm  more for the swordfighting simulation, otherwise you will get another hack and slash game.

The ideas for this game are great and it has a ton of potential. But currently it is very unpolished. Physics, hit boxes , detection, controls- everything could definitely use a major touch up. Hoping to see this game continue to be supported

reviews.review_title: It’s a good concept, just needs work!
reviews.review_description:
I will start by saying, I have no plans for a refund. I got this game from app lab, and just wanted to try it out. I think with a bit more polish, and a few more updates, this game will be great. 

As of right now the collision feels off, no matter how hard I swing, and no matter the direction the sword doesn’t always cut. The twin blades feel clunky, and down right broken. 

The spears are amazing, this game nails the throwing mechanics. I had a lot of fun with the bow as well. 

As for the physics, I really wasn’t feeling it during the time I did play. It’s possible with more time I might start to see the physics shine. 

This game desperately needs some kind of run button, and to update the way the swords feel. However I think it has great promise, and I look forward to seeing where it goes.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! Releasing game on Early Access for primal reason to receive player feedback on core game mechanics. We carefully listen and polish game and it already changed a lot thanks to that. As of run, you its bind on Joystick press down button.

reviews.review_description: Ever since 2020 when they added a teaser for the “unfinished” dojo you get after finding all the updates it says that it will be finish in the next update but two years later no updates
I loved the biss fight and katanas
Everything considered, it’s pretty fun but it can be really buggy and there isn’t a ton of content. Overall, not worth the price.

i expected a great ninja type game wich is sorta right i got a ninja game, the problem is that whenever you pick something up it just breaksdown like it doesnt work properally if that was fixed it would be a five star
I played this game for 10min then it got boring and poorly made I like the sabers but there nothing to battle

it wouldnt let me play

bro waste of time and money!

Good if you want to have fun for a little bit but after you play the game it just feels empty like there not a lot to do you can probably have fun for 10 mins but after that it just gets boring also is kind of buggy overall would not recommend.
This game shows great promise, however it is a very glitchy and needs a lot of polishing. I highly recommend a game like blade and sorcery or gorn over this.
The game is OK but there isn't much content and for all i know it doesn't get updated, i don't recommend the game.

I just lost myself for about an hour and a half playing against the waves of enemies. I thought I didn’t like bow and arrow games but this one got me pumped up. I guess I’m a sucker for this setting. Overall good action and high praise for the atmosphere.    

Negatives
1 Ninjas are incredibly janky when they get up close to swing swords.

2 hit detection with the swords feels very hit or miss.

These complaints are no deal breaker because I know this is early in development.

3Please give players the option to set sprint to a different button. 

I walked away from this game very satisfied and happy.  ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Game has potential but rn its so trash dont waste 10$

reviews.review_title: Pretty good but a few questions
reviews.review_description: First off I want to say that I have no intentions of refunding the game. Currently this game is quite good but there isn't much content. I'm sure that there will be more content, weapons and features coming in the next few updates. I have a few ideas for the game but I'm not a game developer so I don't know if they would be easy to make or if they would be and good but I think that you should have some form of telekinesis that you can use on enemies. I also think that you should be able to use all the weapons in the dojo on enemies as well. Overall a great game just not much content. Also if you see this, do you have any idea when the next update will come out or are you still working on it? Thanks for reading.
